AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Hero. Mighty Patch Invisible+ Hydrocolloid Patches are a discreet and effective solution, gently absorbing gunk for a seamless cover-up. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Don't let a pimple get in the way of a great day. Might Patch Invisible+ pimple patches for daytime blend into skin so seamlessly, they're nearly undetectable. Wear them wherever for gentle gunk-absorbing action.

Introducing the Hero Mighty Patch™ Invisible+ pimple patch - your ultimate companion for those unexpected pimple pop-ups. This ingeniously designed daytime pimple patch is barely visible, blending seamlessly with your skin for a discreet cover-up anytime, anywhere. It's your go-to solution when a pesky pimple decides to make an unwelcome appearance, helping you face the day with confidence. Crafted with sensitive skin in mind, the patch gently absorbs unwanted pimple gunk over a span of 6-8 hours.

The process is simple: prepare your skin by cleansing and drying the pimple area, apply the patch, and watch it work. Once the patch turns white, you know it's time to peel it off. The Mighty Patch Invisible+ pimple patch works great on whiteheads and also shields your skin against any temptation of popping or picking, further aggravating the situation. Made from high-quality, medical-grade hydrocolloid, this reliable pimple patch is a proud product of South Korea.

Always read the label and follow the directions for use.

The Hero Mighty Patch™ Invisible+ pimple patch is the discreet guardian against those unwelcome blemish outbursts, helping you retain your confidence throughout the day.



ALWAYS READ THE LABEL AND FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS FOR USE

SUPER-THIN & DISCREET: Mighty Patch Invisible+ blends seamlessly into your skin for a barely-there look, making it Ideal for daytime wear at work, school, or on the go.

GENTLY ABSORBS PIMPLE GUNK: Made from medical-grade hydrocolloid, this patch absorbs pimple gunk while helping protect your skin from touching or picking.

HELPS SUPPORT A HEALING ENVIRONMENT: Designed to shield skin from external irritants, this patch helps support a healing environment for your skin.

SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: These patches are made of hydrocolloid, a gentle fluid-absorbing gel that is medical-grade and suitable for sensitive skin.

Works great on whiteheads.

Made from medical-grade hydrocolloid.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
VASELINE PETROLEUM JELLY 50 GR

100% pure petroleum jelly. triple- purified. Purity guaranteed. Gentle on skin, hypoallergenic and non - comedogenic (won't clog pores). A soothing dressing for: nappy rash, chafing, sore lips, minor burns, cuts and rough hands. Protects your skin from windburn and chapping and helps reduce the appearance of fine, dry lines on your skin. Vaseline® Petroleum Jelly is the original wonder jelly. Vaseline has long been used to manage symptoms of many severe skin conditions. It literally melts into the skin, flowing into the tiny cracks caused by dryness where moisture is needed most. In this way Vaseline acts as an extremely powerful skin moisturiser to provide a barrier against water loss from already dry skin and help protect against the effects of weather and exposure. Our petroleum jelly is triple-purified to be 100% pure. Vaseline® believes that truly healthy skin starts with deep moisture. It’s not something you get by masking problems or through quick fixes. We know this because we are the original skin experts. Founded in 1870 by Robert Chesebrough, Vaseline® has been safely helping care for skin for over 140 years. It is our goal to make the original, triple-purified Vaseline Petroleum Jelly the core of every product because there is no jelly with a longer history of locking in moisture to strengthen skin barrier and protect dry skin.

Restores the appearance of dry skin.

Absorbs fast for a non-greasy feel on skin.

Leaves your skin deeply moisturised and looking healthier.

With microdroplets of Vaseline Jelly.

Calms and soothes dry, irritated skin.

Use after every shower.

Fight breakouts day & night!


Stop breakouts in their tracks with the MCoBeauty MIRACLE PIMPLE PATCHES. Featuring four different patch sizes suitable for your skin's unique needs, these absorbent hydrocolloid patches contain antibacterial Tea Tree Oil to reduce the appearance of redness, inflammation and protect from additional bacteria contaminating the blemish. the smaller almost transparent patches can be worn during the day and larger patches act as a breakout-fighting addition to your evening skincare routine.


QUICK FACTS:

-Blends clear with skin

-Accelerates skin healing

-Variety of clear dots

-Absorbs impurities

-Contains 36 Hydrocolloid patches -Boosted with Tea Tree Oil


DIRECTIONS:

Ensure your skin is clean and dry prior to application.

Select your chosen pimple patch and apply directly onto the breakout, then gently press onto the skin.

Leave on for at least six hours or preferably overnight.

Carefully peel patch off and discard. reapply a new patch if necessary. Ensure sachet is closed properly after each use.

VASELINE INTENSIVE CARE BODY LOTION DEEP RESTORE 750 ML

Made with oat extract and ultra-hydrating lipids, Vaseline Intensive Care Deep Restore Body Lotion helps keep your skin looking healthy and moisturised – for a difference you can feel. Daily exposure to environmental triggers (like wind, lack of humidity and sun) can cause your skin’s natural moisture barrier to break down, allowing water to escape the skin. This body moisturiser is clinically tested to provide 90% more moisture (vs untreated skin). It absorbs fast without leaving any residue or greasy feel, delivering the nourishing care your skin craves. Simply apply to your skin, preferably after a shower, and enjoy up to 48 hours of moisture. This Vaseline lotion bottle is made from 50% recycled plastic. Vaseline has a range of moisturisers to help restore, soothe and nourish all skin types. We believe skin care is essential for well-being. That’s why Vaseline is working towards giving everybody, everywhere, access to the skin care they need. Visit our website to learn more about our global partnership with Direct Relief.
